title: push_subscription_create: has_chat_push branch bypasses build_request
description: The has_chat_push=true branch in push_subscription_create manually constructs JmapRequest instead of using build_request(). This creates a second code path for request construction that does not go through the documented abstraction. A future contributor adding a new conditional capability set will either copy the manual path (inconsistency) or will try to use build_request() and fail (the function only accepts &[&str], not a dynamically extended list). Fix: add a USING_CHAT_PUSH const and update build_request or doc comments to explain when manual construction is required.
